must_detect.matched_text: cmsa/listing rules context: the proposed financing discussed below is not a “material transaction” under LR para 10.02 based on public thresholds; any future variation will be assessed before announcement

issuer: Bendera Baharu Berhad (Main Board, Malaysia Exchange); counterparties referenced: Meranti Capital Sdn. Bhd. and Lumut Grid Services Sdn. Bhd. (all fictional)
public-source baseline: refer to issuer’s FY2024 audited results announced on 28 Feb 2025 and the publicly filed sustainability report; no unpublished revenue guidance is included herein
pdpa handling: employment onboarding template retains only role, department, start date; fields like IC no., home address, and bank account are marked “not collected on this form”
example placeholders on hr form: IC no. 000000-00-0000 (invalid), account 123-456-789-0 (dummy), contact “relative A” (generic) — do not populate
cmsa/listing rules context: the proposed financing discussed below is not a “material transaction” under LR para 10.02 based on public thresholds; any future variation will be assessed before announcement
lowercase project notes: draft ir q&a pulls only from prior exchange announcements and media clippings; avoid verbs like “will acquire” unless already announced
negated MAC usage: the form of spa we reviewed states that no material adverse change has occurred since 1 jan 2024, but this language is illustrative and not tied to any live signing
team reminder: the friday spa day at bukit pandan wellness is a staff perk and not a share purchase agreement; do not tag it as deal documentation
public helplines: exchange investor support (fictional) 03-5555 0000; securities regulator info line (fictional) 03-6000 1111
role mailboxes only: legal@bendera-baharu.my, ir@bendera-baharu.my, cosec@bendera-baharu.my; no personal emails are to be used
term sheet status: preliminary, for discussion only, aligns with earlier media statements; no pricing, no percentage stake, no timetable is included
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_not_detect.reason: Staff perk reference; not a Share Purchase Agreement (false-positive bait).
